claims.summary: Nested quotes, code boundaries, comments, and filenames must parse without accidental action execution or path confusion.
claims.disposition: verify malformed nested-quote recovery and code-boundary parser tests

claims.summary: Malformed or path-like action input must fail closed and remain reviewable.
claims.disposition: verify low-fill guard, path sanitization, malformed request, and revision-needed tests

claims.summary: RECALL and exhausted research-budget handling should preserve continuity while allowing Recess instead of forcing action.
claims.disposition: verify read-only recall, budget-exhausted status, terminal NEXT suppression, and Recess routing
